metadata.title: SOCRadar Entra ID Integration
metadata.description: Monitor leaked employee credentials via SOCRadar Identity Intelligence and take automated remediation actions in Microsoft Entra ID.
metadata.author: SOCRadar

metadata.description: Internal: Logic App starts 3 min after deploy for role propagation
SOCRadar Identity Intelligence API Key (pay-per-use key, separate from platform key)
SOCRadar Company ID
Domain to monitor for leaked employee credentials (e.g. contoso.com)
Microsoft Entra ID Tenant ID
App Registration Client ID with Entra ID permissions
App Registration Client Secret
Entra ID Security Group Object ID for affected users (required if EnableAddToGroup=true)
Log Analytics Workspace ID for credential and audit logging
Log Analytics Workspace Primary Key
Validate leaked password via ROPC flow (requires Allow public client flows on App Registration). WARNING: Use only in isolated test tenants — ROPC is deprecated by Microsoft.
Revoke all active sign-in sessions for compromised users
Force password change on next sign-in for compromised users (requires User.ReadWrite.All)
Disable account for compromised users (requires User.ReadWrite.All). HIGH IMPACT — default off.
Confirm user as risky in Microsoft Entra ID Identity Protection (requires P1/P2 license and IdentityRiskyUser.ReadWrite.All)
Add compromised users to security group (requires SecurityGroupId parameter and Group.ReadWrite.All)
Create Microsoft Sentinel incidents for credential findings (requires WorkspaceName, WorkspaceLocation, WorkspaceResourceGroup)
How often to check for new leaked credentials (hours, default: 6)
Microsoft Sentinel Log Analytics Workspace Name (required if EnableCreateIncident=true)
Location of the Log Analytics workspace. Must match existing workspace region.
Resource group of the Microsoft Sentinel workspace. Leave default if same RG.

inputs.body: @{json(concat('{"TimeGenerated":"', variables('RunStart'), '","RunType":"Audit","Status":"Error","Message":"Failed to acquire Entra ID access token. Check EntraIdClientId/Secret parameters.","MonitoredDomain":"', parameters('MonitoredDomain'), '"}'))}

runError.message: Failed to acquire Entra ID access token

properties.title: @{concat('[SOCRadar] Leaked Credential: ', items('For_Each_Credential')?['username'])}
properties.description: @{concat('SOCRadar Identity Intelligence detected a leaked credential for ', items('For_Each_Credential')?['username'], '. Source log date: ', items('For_Each_Credential')?['log_date'], '. URL: ', coalesce(items('For_Each_Credential')?['url'], 'N/A'))}

inputs.body: @{json(concat('{"TimeGenerated":"', variables('RunStart'), '","RunType":"Audit","Status":"Success","TotalCredentials":', length(body('Call_SOCRadar_Identity_API')?['data']?['result']), ',"FoundCount":', variables('FoundCount'), ',"NotFoundCount":', variables('NotFoundCount'), ',"DisabledCount":', variables('DisabledCount'), ',"ValidPasswordCount":', variables('ValidPasswordCount'), ',"MonitoredDomain":"', parameters('MonitoredDomain'), '","Checkpoint":"', variables('ApiCheckpoint'), '"}'))}
